commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair lane is needed; the current head has no concrete fix target beyond normal protected maintainer review and merge gating.; Cleared: The diff only changes in-repo gateway session utility null handling and does not touch supply-chain, secrets, permissions, or code-execution surfaces. commands.review_summary:
The PR widens the single-row child-session candidate helpers to tolerate missing session stores by returning empty candidate maps.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: Source-level yes: current main's single-row child-session candidate builder calls `Object.entries(store)`, which throws if a session-info caller supplies a null or undefined store. I did not run tests in the read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; the current head has no concrete fix target beyond normal protected maintainer review and merge gating.

target.title: fix(ci): repair current main checks
target.body:
## Summary

- tolerates missing session-store maps while building single-row child-session candidate indexes
- prevents `chat.history` / session-info paths from throwing when a caller has no loaded store but still asks for child-session metadata
- keeps latest `main`'s lightweight session-row context-token behavior unchanged

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.sessions.list-changed.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=verbose`: passed 1 shard / 135 tests
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/session-utils.ts`: passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json src/gateway/session-utils.ts`: passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed
- touched-file private-name scrub returned no reported private plugin/tool names
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- AWS Crabbox: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label main-ci-blocker-refresh-check-changed --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` (`provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_1e55086ec4b2`, `run=run_da69e0aca19c`, exit 0)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: the gateway no longer throws `Cannot convert undefined or null to object` while building single-row child-session candidates for session-info paths that do not have a loaded store.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree `fix-main-ci-blockers-20260601` rebased onto `origin/main` at `cb9847968a1d38c0d193cfd0da264c26b0d96695`, plus remote AWS Crabbox `cbx_1e55086ec4b2`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reran the focused gateway session list, chat directive-tags, and session search regressions; formatter, lint, diff check, private-name scrub, structured autoreview, and remote `pnpm check:changed`.

Evidence after fix: the focused gateway tests passed 135 tests, including the previously failing `chat.directive-tags` session-info path and the session metadata context-token regression that guards against over-pruning latest-main behavior; AWS Crabbox changed gate selected `core` and `coreTests` and exited 0.

Observed result after fix: missing stores produce an empty child-session candidate map instead of throwing, while valid store callers keep the same candidate and context-token behavior.

What was not tested: full repository suite.
target.author: vincentkoc
